## Summary

## Evidence

- [ ] Tests added/updated
- [ ] Docs updated
- [ ] Schemas updated if contracts changed
- [ ] Demo report regenerated if behavior changed

## Invariant checklist

- [ ] No automatic “liar/guilty” label
- [ ] No single-cue decision
- [ ] Alternatives/counter-evidence included for elevated hypotheses
- [ ] Missing evidence increases uncertainty
- [ ] `make verify` passes locally
